zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertrand de La Tour d'Auvergne IV於1392年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯時，他的父親Bertrand IV de la  Tour33歲，母親Marie d'Auvergne17歲。他於1416年10月20日與Jacquette DU PESCHIN在法國奧維普-德-o奧利格斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1461年3月21日在法國奧維普-德-o拉 圖-達奧維享年69歲，埋葬在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bertrand de La Tour d'Auvergne IV于1392年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯时，他的父亲Bertrand IV de la  Tour33岁，母亲Marie d'Auvergne17岁。他于1416年10月20日与Jacquette DU PESCHIN在法国奧維普-德-o奧利格斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1461年3月21日在法国奧維普-德-o拉 圖-達奧維享年69岁，埋葬在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Tour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (also Thür): habitational name from Thür near Koblenz, or from Thur in Brandenburg and Pomerania.

variants.name: Thor
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Erland, Eyvind, Nels.  Southeast Asian Chor, Tong, Chia, Chu, Kong, Seng, Tou, Chee, Ching, Chou, Chue, Eng, Thai, Moua, Neng, Pao, Yeng, Yer, Blong, Chong, Choua, Houa, Shoua, Soua.
Swedish and Danish: from a short form of any of various Scandinavian personal names containing the first element Thor (Old Norse Thórr), the name of the god of thunder in Scandinavian mythology.
English: from the Anglo-Scandinavian name Thōr, Thūr, probably short forms of Old Norse compound names in Thór-, Thúr- (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Bertrand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval French variant of   Bertram  , imported to Britain by the Normans. In modern times it has been made famous by the English philosopher  Bertrand Russell  (  1872–1970 ), but is only in occasional use.

en.lifeSummary: When Bertrand de La Tour d'Auvergne IV was born in 1392, in Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Bertrand IV de la  Tour, was 33 and his mother, Marie d'Auvergne, was 17. He married Jacquette DU PESCHIN on 20 October 1416, in Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 21 March 1461, in La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France, at the age of 69, and was buried in Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bertrand de La Tour d'Auvergne IV est né en 1392, à Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Bertrand IV de la  Tour, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Marie d'Auvergne, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Jacquette DU PESCHIN le 20 octobre 1416, à Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 21 mars 1461, à La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bertrand de La Tour d'Auvergne IV 1392 in Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bertrand IV de la  Tour 33 und seine Mutter Marie d'Auvergne 17. Er hat am 20. Oktober 1416 in Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Frankreich Jacquette DU PESCHIN geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 21. März 1461 im Alter von 69 Jahren in La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Frankreich und wurde in Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bertrand de La Tour d'Auvergne IV è nato il nel 1392 nel Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Bertrand IV de la  Tour, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Marie d'Auvergne, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Jacquette DU PESCHIN il 20 ottobre 1416, nel Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 21 marzo 1461, nel La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Bertrand de La Tour d'Auvergne IVが1392年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスで生まれた時，父Bertrand IV de la  Tourは33歳，母Marie d'Auvergneは17歳であった。1416年10月20日にフランスアウバーグンプウイ-デ-ドoメオリールグスでJacquette DU PESCHINと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1461年3月21日にフランスアウバーグンプウイ-デ-ドoメラ トウル-ド'アウバーグンで69歳で死去し，フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bertrand de La Tour d'Auvergne IV(이)가 1392년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bertrand IV de la  Tour(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie d'Auvergne(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1416년 10월 20일 프랑스 오버그니 푸이-데-드o 리르구스에서 Jacquette DU PESCHIN(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1461년 3월 21일 프랑스 오버그니 푸이-데-드o 라 토우-드'오버그니에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bertrand de La Tour d'Auvergne IV nasceu em 1392, em Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Bertrand IV de la  Tour, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Marie d'Auvergne, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Jacquette DU PESCHIN em 20 de outubro de 1416, em Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de março de 1461, em La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, França, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertrand de La Tour d'Auvergne IV родился в 1392 г. в местности аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Bertrand IV de la  Tour было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Marie d'Auvergne, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Jacquette DU PESCHIN 20 октября 1416 г. в местности оллииргуесь, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 21 марта 1461 г. в местности ла тоур-д'аувиргн, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргн, Франция в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bertrand de La Tour d'Auvergne IV nació en 1392, en Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Bertrand IV de la  Tour, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Marie d'Auvergne, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Jacquette DU PESCHIN el 20 de octubre de 1416, en Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 21 de marzo de 1461, en La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
